ratingQuestion.title: How would you rate the employee's performance?
ratingQuestion.description: Please rate the employee's overall performance, consider the impact they have had as well as how they live our values

ratingBuckets.title: Outstanding
ratingBuckets.description: The employee has exceeded expectations and has had a significant impact on the team and the company

ratingBuckets.title: Good
ratingBuckets.description: The employee has met expectations and has had a positive impact on the team and the company

ratingBuckets.title: Needs Improvement
ratingBuckets.description: The employee has not met expectations and has had a negative impact on the team and the company

rating.title: Outstanding
rating.description: The employee has exceeded expectations and has had a significant impact on the team and the company

openTextQuestions.text: What should this employee celebrate this year?
What should this employee focus on next year?

multipleChoiceQuestions.text: Does this employee embody company value #1?

multipleChoiceMultiSelectQuestions.text: Which company values does this employee demonstrate?
